title: Intensely Sweet Slovakian Mars Bar Bake
description: A romantic Slovakian dessert featuring Mars bars, cooked to perfection in traditional ttukbaegi earthenware, with a floral and glassy-jelly texture, this dish is sure to impress, it is also kosher friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour and sugar.
Add the melted butter, eggs, and rose water to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Fold in the chopped Mars bars.
Pour the mixture into a ttukbaegi earthenware pot.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
While the bake is cooking, heat the raspberry jelly in a saucepan over low heat until it is smooth and glassy.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Drizzle the raspberry jelly over the top of the bake.
Sprinkle confectioners sugar over the top of the bake.
